target.title: [codex] Fix empty result after exec stdout turns
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes empty user-visible results from Codex exec-only turns where the harness can finish with tool output recorded but no final assistant text.

## Root cause

Two ordering/result-shaping gaps could surface as `payloads=0` even though the command itself succeeded:

- Codex app-server `turn/completed` can arrive while a native tool item is still active, so the projector may finalize before the native `item/completed` is reflected in the snapshot.
- Some exec/bash-only prompts explicitly ask for stdout to be used as the final reply, but the runner previously only promoted trailing tool results for cron `NO_REPLY`.

## Changes

- Defer live `turn/completed` handling until active native tool items complete, while preserving the existing buffered-terminal/client-close behavior.
- Add an explicit, narrow trailing tool-result promotion path for successful exec/bash stdout when the prompt asks for stdout as the final reply and no assistant/message/client-tool side effects are present.
- Keep existing cron `NO_REPLY` behavior and add focused regression coverage for both paths.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Codex exec-only turns can finish with successful native command output but no final assistant payload, surfacing upstream as `payloads=0` / `empty_result`.
- Real environment tested: Local checkout of this PR head `d767b7a868b30e76eb725daa1b7e43cd506bae23` rebased onto current `upstream/main`, on macOS, using the repo's existing Node/Vitest/tsgo toolchain and the Codex app-server production transcript block shape.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  1. Changed the regression fixture to use the actual Codex app-server projector shape: `role: "toolResult"`, `content: [{ type: "toolResult", content: "STDOUT_OK", text: "STDOUT_OK" }]`.
  2. Ran `./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts` before the reader change and confirmed the branch-tied failure: expected `{ text: "STDOUT_OK" }`, received `null`.
  3. Added tool-result block extraction on the trailing tool-result promotion path and reran the same command on this rebased head.
  4. Ran the related Codex app-server deferred-completion test, the shrinkwrap guard that previously failed in CI, and local formatting/lint/type checks.
- Evidence after fix:

```text
./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts
=> Test Files  2 passed (2)
=> Tests  216 passed (216)

./node_modules/.bin/vitest run extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts -t 'defers turn completion until an active native tool item completes'
=> Test Files  1 passed (1)
=> Tests  1 passed | 206 skipped (207)

node scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.mjs --all --check
=> all checked npm-shrinkwrap.json files are current

./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/incomplete-turn.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts
=> All matched files use the correct format.

./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/incomplete-turn.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts
=> Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.

node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
=> exit 0

node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo
=> exit 0

node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo
=> exit 0

./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts before the reader change
=> expected { text: "STDOUT_OK" }, received null
```
- Observed result after fix: The exact app-server `toolResult` block shape now produces `{ text: "STDOUT_OK" }` instead of `null`, so an exec/bash stdout-only turn that is allowed to promote trailing stdout has a visible final payload.
- What was not tested: I did not run a full live gateway from this exact source checkout; the earlier installed-dist live smoke remains separate evidence, while this update adds branch-tied red/green proof for the production block shape ClawSweeper identified.

## Validation

- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/incomplete-turn.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`

---
Restored from closed PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84539
target.author: zhulijin1991
